articles.title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
articles.content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.
articles.titleZh: 零日漏洞完全击败默认的Windows 11 BitLocker保护
articles.contentZh: 目前尚不完全清楚漏洞是如何运作的。微软表示正在进行调查。

articles.title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
articles.content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven restructure," CFO says.
articles.titleZh: 思科在同一天宣布创纪录的收入和4000次裁员
articles.contentZh: 首席财务官表示，裁员“不是由储蓄驱动的重组”。

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
articles.content: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.
articles.titleZh: Linux在多周内被第二次严重漏洞咬伤
articles.contentZh: 生产版补丁即将上线，应立即安装。

articles.title: Chaos erupts as cyberattack disrupts learning platform Canvas amid finals
articles.content: Across the country, schools and colleges postpone year-end tests.
articles.titleZh: 随着网络攻击在决赛中扰乱学习平台Canvas ，混乱爆发
articles.contentZh: 在全国范围内，学校和学院推迟了年终考试。

articles.title: Leaked images reveal Sony’s 10th anniversary ‘ColleXion’ headphones
articles.content: We now have a good idea of what Sony's upcoming 10th anniversary headphones will look like before their expected launch tomorrow. Leaked image renders of what appears to be Sony's 1000X "The ColleXion" Edition have been shared online by OnLeaks and HotEUDeals, showing thicker leatherette padding and "generously sized" earcups compared to Sony's current WH-1000XM6 […]
articles.titleZh: 泄露的图像揭示了索尼的10周年纪念“ColleXion”耳机
articles.contentZh: 我们现在很好地了解了索尼即将推出的10周年纪念耳机在明天推出之前会是什么样子。与索尼目前的WH-1000XM6相比， OnLeaks和HotEUDeals在线共享了索尼1000X “The ColleXion”版本的泄漏图像渲染，显示出更厚的皮革衬垫和“慷慨大小”的耳罩[…]

articles.title: Bad, Bad, Bad, Bad Roommate
articles.content: The wildfires that would come to engulf Los Angeles had just begun to burn when Frankee Grove finally admitted to herself that she needed a roommate. It was January 2025, and Grove, then 42, had recently broken up with her boyfriend of six years. They had lived together in a two-bedroom Spanish bungalow on a […]
articles.contentZh: 吞没洛杉矶的野火刚刚开始燃烧，弗兰基·格罗夫终于承认她需要一个室友。那是2025年1月，当时42岁的格罗夫最近和她交往六年的男朋友分手了。他们一起住在一间两居室的西班牙平房里，位于[…]
